episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 336: The Magic 30th Anniversary Party
episode.description: James, Cliff and new co-host Derek the Dark Mage break down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and talk over the plans for the Magic 30th anniversary party in Vegas this October.
